name: Web Scraper Pipeline
description: Build and execute a web scraping pipeline to extract structured data from a target website

steps.title: Analyze target site structure
steps.description: Visit the target website and analyze its HTML structure, identify the data elements to extract, determine pagination patterns, and note any anti-scraping measures.
steps.expected_output: Site analysis report with DOM selectors, pagination logic, rate limiting notes, and data schema

steps.title: Write scraper code
steps.description: Implement the web scraper with proper error handling, rate limiting, retry logic, and data extraction. Handle pagination and dynamic content loading if needed.
steps.expected_output: Complete scraper script with extraction logic, error handling, and respectful rate limiting

steps.title: Test the scraper
steps.description: Run the scraper against a small sample of pages to verify data extraction accuracy. Check for edge cases, missing data handling, and performance.
steps.expected_output: Test results showing extraction accuracy, performance metrics, and any issues found

steps.title: Format and export output
steps.description: Format the extracted data into clean, structured output formats (JSON, CSV). Add metadata, timestamps, and generate a summary of the scraped data.
steps.expected_output: Formatted data files (JSON/CSV) with metadata and a summary report of extracted records
